title: Steam 'n' Rails Server Modpack
description: The official Steam 'n' Rails Season 2 SMP Modpack
body:
## This is the official modpack for the Steam 'n' Rails Season 2 SMP

To get whitelisted and learn more about the server and modpack visit [s2.railways.dev](https://s2.railways.dev/). You can also check out our [discord](https://discord.com/invite/UKFkg5NQzu) for more info.

## Summary
This is a performant fabric modpack that is designed to be used on a large community-run nations SMP, complete with a full economy and extensive rail infastructure.

## World Generation
The SMP features a large custom generated overworld seperated by vast oceans into seperate distinct continents where the SMPs nations can be found. A map of this world and the nether is available at [map.s2.railways.dev](https://map.s2.railways.dev/).

We use custom world generation mods such as Natures Spirit, Better End, Nullscaped, & Amplified Nether so exploration is never dull.

## The Nations
The server includes a number of community-run nations. All with different build styles, governance structures and access to certain resources such as Deep Drilling ore nodes. Nations are deeply interconnected by rail and are able to trade resources easily with the help of a common currency mod Create Numismatics.

## Donate
The server is funded entirely from the individual contributions of our members. All this money goes towards improving our server infastructure. You can help support us by sending a donation to [opencollective.com/railways](https://opencollective.com/railways)
